zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Derwentwater於1362年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德波藍德時，她的父親John Derwentwater22歲，母親Margaret Strickland17歲。她和Henry de Scarisbrick II至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1442年在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Derwentwater was born in 1362, in Cumberland, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Derwentwater, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Strickland, was 17. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Henry de Scarisbrick II. She died in 1442, in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Derwentwater est née en 1362, à Cumberland, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Derwentwater, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Strickland, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Henry de Scarisbrick II. Elle est décédée en 1442, à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Derwentwater 1362 in Cumberland, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Derwentwater 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret Strickland 17. Sie hatte mit Henry de Scarisbrick II mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1442 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Derwentwater è nata il nel 1362 nel Cumberland, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Derwentwater, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret Strickland, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Henry de Scarisbrick II. Morì nel 1442, nel Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Derwentwater(이)가 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Derwentwater(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Strickland(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Henry de Scarisbrick II(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Derwentwater родилась в 1362 г. в местности кумбирланд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Derwentwater было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Strickland, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Henry de Scarisbrick II. Она умерла в 1442 г. в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.
